component.name: ZapretDesktop
component.summary: GUI for zapret DPI bypass on Linux

description.p: ZapretDesktop is a PyQt6 GUI for managing zapret strategies on Linux via the zapret-discord-youtube-linux adapter (service.sh, nfqws, nftables).
The application does not bundle nfqws; install the Linux adapter separately and point ZapretDesktop to the directory containing service.sh.
